title: Salter Rapid Boil Kettle – 1.7L Capacity, 360° Swivel Base, Removable Limescale Filter, Water Level Indicator, Stainless Steel, Boil Dry Sensor, Auto Shut-Off, Strix Controller, 3000 W
features: LARGE 1.7 LITRE CAPACITY: This stainless steel kettle from Salter is a must have for making any hot drink. Whether it is your morning coffee or making tea for family and guests, the 1.7 litre capacity ensure less refilling.
360° SWIVEL BASE: The swivel base makes it easy for both left and right handed users no matter where it’s placed on your kitchen countertop.
REMOVABLE LIMESCALE FILTER: With a built-in limescale filter that can be easily removed to clean and pop straight back in!
BOIL DRY SENSOR & AUTO SHUT-OFF: For added safety, this rapid boil kettle has a boil dry sensor and auto shut-off for when you forget about your brew.
STAINLESS STEEL DESIGN: Add a touch of style to any home and coordinate your kitchen with the Salter stainless steel kettle and coordinate with the matching toaster!
